messages.content:
You are a regulatory dossier review assistant.

You will receive one neutral evidence package from a bidirectional Dual-RAG system.

Your task:
- Compare guideline expectations with retrieved dossier evidence.
- Decide whether the evidence indicates a regulatory gap, no gap, uncertainty, or need for human review.
- Use only the provided evidence.
- Do not use outside knowledge.
- Do not assume missing information unless the retrieved evidence is weak, absent, or only shows nearby unrelated content.
- Do not mention gold labels, expected answers, or test data.
- Return only valid JSON.
- Do not wrap the JSON in markdown.
- Do not include chain-of-thought. Provide only a concise reasoning_summary.

Allowed llm_decision values:
gap, no_gap, uncertain, needs_human_review

Allowed severity values:
high, medium, low, none

Allowed finding_type values:
missing_section, value_inconsistency, entity_inconsistency, endpoint_inconsistency,
safety_count_inconsistency, unsupported_claim, weak_justification,
insufficient_evidence, no_gap, other

Review the following evidence package and return only valid JSON using the required schema.

Evidence package:
{
  "package_id": "SYN-D2G",
  "direction": "dossier_to_guideline",
  "source_type": "dossier_fact",
  "dossier_fact": {
    "fact_id": "FACT-SYN",
    "fact_type": "shelf_life_statement",
    "extracted_value": null,
    "fact_text": "Shelf Life: 18 months.",
    "source": {
      "file_name": "product_information_variant.pdf",
      "document_type": "synthetic_document",
      "module_guess": "Synthetic Module",
      "page_number": 1,
      "section": null,
      "chunk_id": "product_information_variant.pdf_chunk_1",
      "source_hash": "synthetic_hash"
    }
  },
  "guideline_evidence_strength": "medium",
  "guideline_evidence": [
    {
      "retrieval_score": 0.78,
      "evidence_status": "strong",
      "guideline_id": "ICH_Q1A",
      "title": "Synthetic guideline evidence",
      "version": "R1",
      "domain": "Synthetic regulatory domain",
      "source_file": "ICH_Q1A_Guideline.pdf",
      "page_number": 10,
      "section": "2.2",
      "chunk_id": "ICH_Q1A_2.2_chunk",
      "text": "The stability summary should support the proposed shelf life and storage conditions."
    }
  ],
  "cross_dossier_evidence_strength": "medium",
  "cross_dossier_evidence": [
    {
      "retrieval_score": 0.82,
      "evidence_status": "strong",
      "file_name": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf",
      "document_type": "synthetic_document",
      "module_guess": "Synthetic Module",
      "page_number": 1,
      "section": "3.2.P.8.1",
      "chunk_id": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf_chunk_1",
      "source_hash": "synthetic_hash",
      "text": "The proposed shelf life of the drug product is 36 months."
    }
  ],
  "task": "Assess whether the dossier fact, claim, value, endpoint, count, or entity is supported by relevant guideline expectations and consistent with other retrieved dossier evidence."
}

{"llm_decision": "gap", "finding_type": "value_inconsistency", "severity": "high", "evidence_status": "strong", "ctd_section": "3.2.P.8.1", "finding_summary": "Shelf life differs between label (18 months) and Module 3 (36 months).", "reasoning_summary": "The label states 18 months, while retrieved Module 3 evidence states 36 months.", "guideline_citations": [{"guideline_id": "ICH_Q1A", "source_file": "Q1A(R2)_Guideline.pdf", "page_number": 10, "section": "2.2", "chunk_id": "ICH_Q1A_2.2_chunk"}], "dossier_citations": [{"file_name": "product_information_variant.pdf", "page_number": 1, "section": null, "chunk_id": "product_information_variant.pdf_chunk_1"}, {"file_name": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf", "page_number": 1, "section": "3.2.P.8.1", "chunk_id": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf_chunk_1"}], "reviewer_action": "Align shelf-life information between Module 3 and the product label.", "needs_rule_verification": true}

{"llm_decision": "no_gap", "finding_type": "no_gap", "severity": "none", "evidence_status": "strong", "ctd_section": "2.7.4", "finding_summary": "Serious adverse event count is consistent.", "reasoning_summary": "Both retrieved sources report 4 serious adverse events.", "guideline_citations": [{"guideline_id": "ICH_E3", "source_file": "E3_Guideline.pdf", "page_number": 24, "section": "12.3", "chunk_id": "ICH_E3_12.3_chunk"}], "dossier_citations": [{"file_name": "module_2_clinical_summary_variant.pdf", "page_number": 1, "section": null, "chunk_id": "module_2_clinical_summary_variant.pdf_chunk_1"}, {"file_name": "module_5_csr_variant.pdf", "page_number": 1, "section": "8", "chunk_id": "module_5_csr_variant.pdf_chunk_1"}], "reviewer_action": "No immediate action required for SAE count consistency.", "needs_rule_verification": true}

Review the following evidence package and return only valid JSON using the required schema.

Evidence package:
{
  "package_id": "SYN-G2D",
  "direction": "guideline_to_dossier",
  "source_type": "guideline_requirement",
  "guideline_requirement": {
    "guideline_id": "ICH_M4Q",
    "guideline_version": "R1",
    "section": "3.2.P.8.2",
    "title": "Common Technical Document - Quality",
    "domain": "Quality / Module 3",
    "source_file": "M4Q_R1_Guideline.pdf",
    "page_number": 22,
    "chunk_id": "ICH_M4Q_3.2.P.8.2",
    "requirement_text": "3.2.P.8.2 should be provided in the dossier."
  },
  "dossier_evidence_strength": "medium",
  "dossier_evidence": [
    {
      "retrieval_score": 0.61,
      "evidence_status": "medium",
      "file_name": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf",
      "document_type": "synthetic_document",
      "module_guess": "Synthetic Module",
      "page_number": 1,
      "section": "3.2.P.8.1",
      "chunk_id": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf_chunk_1",
      "source_hash": "synthetic_hash",
      "text": "The dossier contains nearby section 3.2.P.8.1, but no direct evidence of 3.2.P.8.2."
    }
  ],
  "task": "Assess whether the retrieved dossier evidence adequately addresses the guideline requirement."
}

{"llm_decision": "gap", "finding_type": "missing_section", "severity": "high", "evidence_status": "medium", "ctd_section": "3.2.P.8.2", "finding_summary": "Required section 3.2.P.8.2 is not directly evidenced in the retrieved dossier content.", "reasoning_summary": "The guideline expects 3.2.P.8.2, but retrieved dossier evidence shows only nearby content and no direct evidence of that section.", "guideline_citations": [{"guideline_id": "ICH_M4Q", "source_file": "M4Q_R1_Guideline.pdf", "page_number": 22, "section": "3.2.P.8.2", "chunk_id": "ICH_M4Q_3.2.P.8.2"}], "dossier_citations": [{"file_name": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf", "page_number": 1, "section": "3.2.P.8.1", "chunk_id": "module_3_quality_stability_variant.pdf_chunk_1"}], "reviewer_action": "Verify whether 3.2.P.8.2 exists elsewhere or add the missing required section.", "needs_rule_verification": true}
